They're into the backstretch, and the pace is measured. 
The pack is stretched thin, each runner waiting for the 
right time to pounce.

Nearing her Triple Crown, Mihono Bourbon is well 
positioned here, with Rice Shower following in fifth 
position.
Focus on Bourbon… Just keep following… Keep following…

They're up the slope and into the third corner! It all comes 
down to this! The real Kikuka Sho begins here!

Oh! And now Mihono Bourbon makes her move! Eyeing 
that Triple Crown, she prances into the lead!
I want to catch up to her! To be closer… Closer!

She's too strong! She's Mihono Bourbon! In the lead with 
200 meters to go! But from behind it's Rice Shower! Rice 
Shower is gaining on her!
Here she comes. Just like I predicted!

Mihono Bourbon is flying away! She's opened up over a 
two-length gap!

But coming up on her outside is Rice Shower! Rice Shower 
is putting on a furious run!
I can hear her!
Her breathing, her heartbeat…
Even her thoughts — I can hear them all!
She's still there? Her footsteps are getting closer! No!

Rice Shower is in hot pursuit! Two lengths! One length! And 
they're neck and neck! She's caught Mihono Bourbon!
Tch… Haaaah!
I want to win too! I want my win against Bourbon!

And she's pulling ahead — the leader is now Rice Shower! 
After a duel with Triple Crown hopeful Mihono Bourbon, 
Rice Shower has taken the lead!
Yaaaaah!
And Rice Shower's done it!

Leaving undefeated Double Crown champion Mihono 
Bourbon in her dust, Rice Shower finishes in first!
